ddls:
CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* Website URL of the brand */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the brand */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the brand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_subcategories" (
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subcategory */,
  "subcategory_name" TEXT /* Name of the subcategory */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subcategory */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the subcategory belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subcategory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_options" (
  "option_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each option */,
  "option_name" TEXT /* Name of the option */,
  "option_type" TEXT /* Type of the option */,
  "option_values" TEXT /* Values for the option */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("option_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_option_sets" (
  "option_set_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each option set */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the option set belongs to */,
  "option_id" INTEGER /* ID of the option */,
  "display_type" TEXT /* Type of display for the option */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("option_set_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_option_sets_option_id FOREIGN KEY ("option_id") REFERENCES product_options ("option_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text content of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tax_classes" (
  "tax_class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tax class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the tax class */,
  "tax_rate" REAL /* Tax rate for the class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tax_class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_variants" (
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variant */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the variant belongs to */,
  "option_id" INTEGER /* ID of the option */,
  "option_value" TEXT /* Value of the option for the variant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_variants_option_id FOREIGN KEY ("option_id") REFERENCES product_options ("option_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variant */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity in stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_variant_id FOREIGN KEY ("variant_id") REFERENCES product_variants ("variant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "warehouse_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the warehouse */,
  "capacity" REAL /* Capacity of the warehouse */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping" (
  "shipping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping method */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the shipping method applies to */,
  "method" TEXT /* Name of the shipping method */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of shipping */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, manager) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the product */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the product data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the image belongs to */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id")
)
